reviews.review_description:
I’m am a mod and my music is in forest - 7/31/25

Game owner does all of the work all by himself and he is a very good person

The grip buttons don’t even work the movement is so broken u will not name but a mod is very rude and player model looks bad L game never play again also the music in the loading screen is way to loud and annoying this is the worst fan game EVER make your game better😊
It’s so fun and nice to play with friend’s and just chill with people and the owner is W
This is a little bias since I am a mod but even before that I loved how nice this game is. It’s really relaxing for an unfinished masterpiece. You should definitely spend time to play this game

awesome game i really enjoyed the graphics and looking around the only people i've met in here are pukkerz. but it's really fun and entertaining and also kind of funny i do got to say that they should add codes anyways great game.

I have fun playing with moderators like my brother. I met about half of the moderators and I met the owner one time. He is pretty chill.

Also Mike VR’s review is false.
The owner of the game is great and will take any feedback! The game is very fun to hang out with friends and relax.
Very fun and has some wonderful game modes, cool cosmetics, and lovely moderators
